question: What are the stowed dimensions of the Acme R1 in inches?

messages.name: fetch_url
messages.content:
# Acme Robotics R1 — US Customer Datasheet

- Dimensions: 32.3 in x 21.3 in x 43.3 in (stowed)
- Mass: 83.8 lb
- Maximum payload (arm): 11 lb

args.answer: The Acme R1 stowed dimensions are **32.3 x 21.3 x 43.3 inches**, per the US Customer Datasheet (imperial units).

final_answer: The Acme R1 stowed dimensions are **32.3 x 21.3 x 43.3 inches**, per the US Customer Datasheet (imperial units).
